summary: 验收 clean plan/apply 安全边界、dry-run JSON 预览能力和 workflow 测试夹具治理，降低后续重构风险。

coverage.spec: 需求：clean 先计划后执行 / 场景：dry-run JSON 展示将删除和保护项且不删除文件
coverage.risk: 不覆盖 Windows lock 细节，平台差异由既有锁测试补充。

coverage.spec: 需求：clean 默认行为兼容 / 场景：apply 使用同一计划删除 failed run
coverage.risk: 不覆盖所有 agent session SQLite schema，沿用既有 best-effort 逻辑。

coverage.spec: 需求：workflow 测试夹具收敛 / 场景：核心 workflow 测试存在共享 fixture
coverage.risk: 不强制一次迁移所有历史测试 helper，只要求核心 fixture 边界存在并被使用。

required_tests.path: docs/changes/archive/2026-06-17-40-运行态清理与测试基建治理/tests/clean_plan_and_fixture_contract_test.sh
required_tests.command: bash docs/changes/archive/2026-06-17-40-运行态清理与测试基建治理/tests/clean_plan_and_fixture_contract_test.sh | tee test-results/40-clean-plan-fixture/acceptance-command.log
required_tests.purpose: 证明 oz flow clean 先生成计划再执行删除，并且核心 workflow 测试夹具已经收敛。
assertions: clean plan fixture contract verifies oz flow clean --dry-run --json reports delete actions for failed runtime state without deleting the run directory
clean plan fixture contract verifies oz flow clean applies the same planned deletion to a real temporary repository runtime state
clean plan fixture contract verifies internal/app has a shared workflow fixture and go test ./internal/app continues to pass
required_tests.expected_initial_failure: 当前实现尚未支持 clean --dry-run --json，也未形成目标 clean plan 和 workflow fixture 边界。

required_evidence.purpose: 记录 clean dry-run/apply 和 workflow fixture 验证过程，供 QA 复核。
